욥기 29:1.content: Job again took up his parable, and said,

욥기 29:2.content: “Oh that I were as in the months of old, as in the days when God watched over me;

욥기 29:3.content: when his lamp shone on my head, and by his light I walked through darkness,

욥기 29:4.content: as I was in my prime, when the friendship of God was in my tent,

욥기 29:5.content: when the Almighty was yet with me, and my children were around me,

욥기 29:6.content: when my steps were washed with butter, and the rock poured out streams of oil for me,

욥기 29:7.content: when I went out to the city gate, when I prepared my seat in the street.

욥기 29:8.content: The young men saw me and hid themselves. The aged rose up and stood.

욥기 29:9.content: The princes refrained from talking, and laid their hand on their mouth.

욥기 29:10.content: The voice of the nobles was hushed, and their tongue stuck to the roof of their mouth.

욥기 29:11.content: For when the ear heard me, then it blessed me; and when the eye saw me, it commended me:

욥기 29:12.content: Because I delivered the poor who cried, and the fatherless also, who had no one to help him,

욥기 29:13.content: the blessing of him who was ready to perish came on me, and I caused the widow’s heart to sing for joy.

욥기 29:14.content: I put on righteousness, and it clothed me. My justice was as a robe and a diadem.

욥기 29:15.content: I was eyes to the blind, and feet to the lame.

욥기 29:16.content: I was a father to the needy. I researched the cause of him who I didn’t know.

욥기 29:17.content: I broke the jaws of the unrighteous and plucked the prey out of his teeth.

욥기 29:18.content: Then I said, ‘I will die in my own house, I will count my days as the sand.

욥기 29:19.content: My root is spread out to the waters. The dew lies all night on my branch.

욥기 29:20.content: My glory is fresh in me. My bow is renewed in my hand.’

욥기 29:21.content: “Men listened to me, waited, and kept silence for my counsel.

욥기 29:22.content: After my words they didn’t speak again. My speech fell on them.

욥기 29:23.content: They waited for me as for the rain. Their mouths drank as with the spring rain.

욥기 29:24.content: I smiled on them when they had no confidence. They didn’t reject the light of my face.

욥기 29:25.content: I chose out their way, and sat as chief. I lived as a king in the army, as one who comforts the mourners.
